description: STREAM (Single-cell Trajectories Reconstruction, Exploration And Mapping) is an interactive pipeline capable of disentangling and visualizing complex branching trajectories from both single-cell transcriptomic and epigenomic data. STREAM.ElasticPrincipalGraph is uses elastic principal graph learning to calculate a pseudotime trajectory.
author: Ted Liefeld, UCSD School of Medicine.
plan:
## STREAM.ElasticPrincipalGraph GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
STREAM.ElasticPrincipalGraph is a GenePattern module that STREAM (Single-cell Trajectories Reconstruction, Exploration And Mapping) is an interactive pipeline capable of disentangling and visualizing complex branching trajectories from both single-cell transcriptomic and epigenomic data. STREAM.ElasticPrincipalGraph is uses elastic principal graph learning to calculate a pseudotime trajectory.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 16 parameters:
- Required: data.file, epg.beta, figure.legend.num.columns, output.filename, epg.num.nodes, incremental.number.of.nodes, epg.trimming.radius, component.x, component.y, num.components, epg.alpha, epg.lambda, epg.mu, epg.final.energy
- Optional: figure.width, figure.height

### 3. Command Line
```
python /stream/epg_command_line.py -m <data.file> -of <output.filename> <figure.width> <figure.height> <figure.legend.num.columns> <component.x> <component.y> <num.components> <epg.num.nodes>  <incremental.number.of.nodes> <epg.trimming.radius> <epg.alpha> -epg_n_processes <job.cpuCount>  <epg.lambda> <epg.mu> <epg.final.energy> <epg.beta>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/stream_elasticprincipalgraph\:0.2

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.file
parameters.description: A STREAM pkl file containing preprocessed, dimension reduced gene expression data that has had a structure seeded into it.

parameters.name: epg.beta
parameters.description: Beta parameter of the penalized elastic energy.

parameters.name: figure.legend.num.columns
parameters.description: The number of columns that the legend has.

parameters.name: epg.num.nodes
parameters.description: Number of nodes for elastic principal graph.

parameters.name: incremental.number.of.nodes
parameters.description: Incremental number of nodes for elastic principal graph when epg_n_nodes is not big enough.

parameters.name: epg.trimming.radius
parameters.description: Maximal distance from a node to the points it controls in the embedding.

parameters.name: component.x
parameters.description: Component used for x-axis in plots,

parameters.name: component.y
parameters.description: Component used for y-axis in plots,

parameters.name: num.components
parameters.description: Number of components to be plotted.

parameters.name: epg.alpha
parameters.description: Alpha parameter of the penalized elastic energy.

parameters.name: epg.lambda
parameters.description: Lambda parameter used to compute the elastic energy.

parameters.name: epg.mu
parameters.description: Mu parameter used to compute the elastic energy.

parameters.name: epg.final.energy
parameters.description: Indicate the final elastic energy associated with the configuration.
